name: HK Horse Racing
description: Fetches HKJC race cards, filters SB horses, and recommends top picks per race with optional advanced scoring (trainer/jockey bonuses, barrier effectiveness, weight penalty). Supports exclusions, single-race fetch, and rate limiting (60s).

tools.name: fetchRaceCard
tools.description: Fetch race card for a given date (default: today) with odds, horse details, and recommendations

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (default: today in HKT)

classFilter.description: Optional list of class strings to filter (e.g., ["Class 4"])

language.description: Output language. Only English supported. Default: 'en'.

excludeHorseNos.description: Optional list of horse numbers to exclude from output and recommendations (e.g., [7]).

excludeBarriers.description: Optional list of barrier numbers to exclude from output and recommendations (e.g., [7]).

raceNo.description: Optional: fetch only this specific race number. If omitted, returns all races for the date.

advancedScoring.description: Enable advanced scoring: includes trainer/jockey bonuses, barrier effectiveness, weight penalty, and light weight bonus. Default: false.

tjBonusWeight.description: Weight for trainer/jockey combo bonus when advancedScoring=true. Range 0-0.3. Default: 0.15.

barrierBonusWeight.description: Weight for barrier effectiveness bonus when advancedScoring=true. Range 0-0.2. Default: 0.12.

newsBoost.description: When advancedScoring=true, also fetch news sentiment for each horse via Brave search (slower). Default: false.

lightWeightBonus.description: Bonus for horses with weight < 120lb when advancedScoring=true. Range 0-0.2. Default: 0.05.
